content:
# playwright-overlay-modal-iframe-handling - Overview

Automation type: overlay_modal_iframe
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Handle overlays, modals, dropdowns, popups, and iframes without brittle clicks.
Evidence: official / medium
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

When to use:
- Element is covered
- Dropdown option not clickable
- Modal blocks page
- Target content inside iframe
- Popup opens new page

Inputs required:
- Current screenshot
- Expected target element
- Frame/popup relationship

AI summary: For overlays/modals/dropdowns/iframes, detect the blocking surface, interact by role, use frameLocator or popup waits, then verify target state by screenshot/assertion.

# playwright-overlay-modal-iframe-handling - Execution Steps

Automation type: overlay_modal_iframe
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Handle overlays, modals, dropdowns, popups, and iframes without brittle clicks.
Evidence: official / medium
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Check for visible dialogs/overlays before clicking underlying controls.
- Close or interact with modal using role/name locators.
- Use frameLocator for iframe content.
- Use page.waitForEvent('popup') when a new tab/window is expected.
- Wait for dropdown listbox/menu option visibility before selecting.

AI summary: For overlays/modals/dropdowns/iframes, detect the blocking surface, interact by role, use frameLocator or popup waits, then verify target state by screenshot/assertion.

# playwright-overlay-modal-iframe-handling - Commands or APIs

Automation type: overlay_modal_iframe
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Handle overlays, modals, dropdowns, popups, and iframes without brittle clicks.
Evidence: official / medium
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- page.getByRole('dialog')
- frameLocator(...)
- page.waitForEvent('popup')
- getByRole('option')
- getByRole('menuitem')

AI summary: For overlays/modals/dropdowns/iframes, detect the blocking surface, interact by role, use frameLocator or popup waits, then verify target state by screenshot/assertion.

# playwright-overlay-modal-iframe-handling - Verification

Automation type: overlay_modal_iframe
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Handle overlays, modals, dropdowns, popups, and iframes without brittle clicks.
Evidence: official / medium
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Overlay no longer covers target
- Correct frame/popup receives action
- Selected option appears
- Screenshot confirms state

AI summary: For overlays/modals/dropdowns/iframes, detect the blocking surface, interact by role, use frameLocator or popup waits, then verify target state by screenshot/assertion.

# playwright-overlay-modal-iframe-handling - Failure Modes

Automation type: overlay_modal_iframe
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Handle overlays, modals, dropdowns, popups, and iframes without brittle clicks.
Evidence: official / medium
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Click intercepted
- Wrong frame
- Popup missed
- Dropdown closes before selection
- Overlay animation still running

AI summary: For overlays/modals/dropdowns/iframes, detect the blocking surface, interact by role, use frameLocator or popup waits, then verify target state by screenshot/assertion.

# playwright-overlay-modal-iframe-handling - Safety Notes

Automation type: overlay_modal_iframe
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Handle overlays, modals, dropdowns, popups, and iframes without brittle clicks.
Evidence: official / medium
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Do not dismiss security/permission/payment dialogs unless user explicitly authorizes it.

AI summary: For overlays/modals/dropdowns/iframes, detect the blocking surface, interact by role, use frameLocator or popup waits, then verify target state by screenshot/assertion.

# playwright-overlay-modal-iframe-handling - Handoff Report

Automation type: overlay_modal_iframe
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Handle overlays, modals, dropdowns, popups, and iframes without brittle clicks.
Evidence: official / medium
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Blocking element found
- Frame/popup handled
- Final visible state

AI summary: For overlays/modals/dropdowns/iframes, detect the blocking surface, interact by role, use frameLocator or popup waits, then verify target state by screenshot/assertion.
